title: rubus mollior
intro: Rubus mollior, also known as the 'Garden Blackberry', is a deciduous shrub native to China, characterized by its thorny branches and dark green leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are known to have analgesic and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Rubus mollior include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation and alleviating pain, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and support immune system function. Rubus mollior is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, with some preparations also being used topically to treat skin conditions and promote tissue repair.
